'''Averill''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Averill system/Legends|Averill system]] where the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] discovered a rich [[quadrenium]] lode beneath the crust; quadrenium was refined for [[Starship/Legends|starship]] construction. The native [[Human/Legends|Humans]] were originally divided into autonomous [[mine-clan]]s dwelling in inherited [[minehold]]s. After the Empire nationalized the local mining operations, a preventable mining accident crippled [[Selby Jarrad]]'s father. Selby and her cousin failed to create a resistance cell on the planet, so Selby joined [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]].

{{Planet-stub}}
